name: 量子力学的原子模型（HL）
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 结构 1 · 物质的模型 Structure 1 · Models of the Particulate Nature of Matter
curriculum_points: Describe the quantum mechanical model of the atom, including the concepts of atomic orbitals, quantum numbers (n, l, m_l, m_s), and electron spin, and use it to explain atomic emission spectra and ionization energies (AO2, AO3).

Apply the Aufbau principle, Hund's rule, and the Pauli exclusion principle to deduce electron configurations for atoms and ions up to Z = 36, and explain the anomalous configurations of Cr and Cu (AO2).

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化
